name: Input Sanitization
description: Preprocess and classify user, retrieval, and tool inputs to reduce unsafe instructions, malformed content, and policy-conflicting data.
implementation_guidance: Apply format validation and content classification before prompt assembly.
Normalize encodings and markup that may hide instruction-like content.
Route high-risk input through review, quarantine, or reduced-privilege handling.
verification_methods: Run tests with direct, indirect, encoded, and multilingual instruction-conflict patterns.
Review logs for sanitizer decisions, bypasses, and false positives.
Measure whether sanitization preserves benign task utility.
